rationale: Granular 8h funding rates, open interest, and 30-day correlation coefficients for AAVE are not exposed on any free public endpoint without authentication or a paid plan: Coinglass requires a paid API key for per-asset funding/OI data beyond basic UI snapshots, CoinGecko free tier does not publish funding rates or correlation matrices, and no free FRED/alternative.me endpoint covers DeFi token derivatives positioning or cross-asset correlations at this resolution.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/funding/AAVE — UI shows funding directionally but machine-readable historical data requires paid API (https://docs.coinglass.com/)
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/aave — price/volume/market cap only on free tier; no funding rate or correlation fields
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market-wide sentiment only, no per-asset derivatives data
https://defillama.com/protocol/aave — TVL/protocol metrics only, no derivatives or correlation data
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/ — macro/TradFi data only; no crypto derivatives or correlation series
